Okay, guys, I want to talk to you guys about creating custom events. So when you're working with these kinds of funnels, coaching funnels, especially if you're going to be building out landing pages, the likelihood of you having to use custom events is probably about 95%. And the reason for that is because Facebook only really gives you nine standard events to work from. So remember when you are setting up a pixel, we go continue. You'll see Facebook gives you these essentially default standard events to work with purchase, complete registration, etc. Now, the reality is a lot of these don't make a lot of sense. If you go and add, for example, search on your landing page to track people that have hit your landing page, it's going to get really confusing. If anyone else needs to go in the account, they're not going to know what is what. So custom events allow you to name your own names for events. Instead of using the word search, you could use viewed lead magnet, for example. And that means that when you go inside of your reporting column, you can pretty much pull up your entire funnel that you've mapped out for your client. ## [03:01 - 05:26]

What I have to do is I have to trigger this inside a new tab. And you'll see here the pixel tool helper has picked up the custom event. Perfect. Now here's the next really important step. So previewing this to trigger this is really important. It's going to take about an hour for this to feed back to the ad account. Okay? And so the next step is that unfortunately custom events do not show up inside of your reporting column. So they're not going to show up inside of this customized column that we have inside of our ad managers. So if I went in here after about an hour and I clicked on customize columns, unfortunately viewed magnet wouldn't be there. So how can I view the reports on this event if it doesn't show up here? The answer is that we need to create a custom conversion of our custom event. So I'm going to go ahead and click on custom conversions here. And I'm going to create a custom conversion. Now this isn't, I'm going to click on here and it will essentially be underneath the purchase. Now it's not here yet because I only just previewed it, right? I haven't given it enough time to feed back. In about an hour, if I come back here, you'll see viewed magnet will be down here. I'll essentially select that. I'll give it the same exact name as what it's called in my funnel viewed magnet. And then this means that when I go inside of my reporting column now, I'll be able to pull up that custom conversion and it will show me the stats on this standard event. Now you might be wondering to yourself, why don't I just create a custom conversion? The reason for that is that you cannot optimize OCPM camp ECPM campaigns using custom conversions and also certain platforms like click funnels are very glitchy with custom conversions. So they have dynamic URLs and it doesn't work really well. Custom events are just a much more stable and robust form of reporting. So I would recommend you just get in a habit of using custom events over custom conversions whenever you can. And all we're doing is creating a custom conversion of our custom events so that we can see it inside the reporting. And this is how to set this up.
